Patch Set 11:

Hi Fan Yong. Saw this error in review-dne run with the patch.

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == recovery-small test 110a: create remote directory: drop client req == 13:55:36 (1388094936)

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/bin/lfs mkdir -i 1 /mnt/lustre/d0.recovery-small/d110/remote_dir

LustreError: 32355:0:(fid_request.c:223:seq_client_alloc_seq()) cli-cli-lustre-MDT0001-mdc-ffff88007ab8c000: Can't allocate new meta-sequence,rc -5

LustreError: 32355:0:(fid_request.c:357:seq_client_alloc_fid()) cli-cli-lustre-MDT0001-mdc-ffff88007ab8c000: Can't allocate new sequence, rc -5

LustreError: 32355:0:(lmv_obd.c:1377:lmv_fid_alloc()) Can't alloc new fid, rc -5

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  recovery-small test_110a: @@@@@@ FAIL: lfs mkdir failed
Uploaded patch set 12.

Patch Set 11:

Wangdi: recovery-small test_110a failed for LU-4419, not related with LFSCK patch.

parents.subject: LU-3594 lfsck: repair inconsistent OST-object owner

commit.subject: LU-3592 lfsck: repair multiple referenced OST-object
commit.message:
LU-3592 lfsck: repair multiple referenced OST-object

If both MDT-object1 and MDT-object2 claim the OST-object1 as one
of its child OST-object, but the OST-object1 only recognizes the
MDT-object1, then the LFSCK will create new a OST-object and fix
the MDT-object2's layout information to reference the new created
OST-object.

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I1c39801a75d0ceb62fdca034c22945dc336a5bcb
